query: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes June 24 confirmed death toll latest figures, trajectory of confirmed deaths reported by authorities and Wikipedia, number of missing persons and rescue operation status
answer:
I've completed the research. Here is a summary of the key findings on the 2026 Venezuela earthquakes (June 24):

**Latest confirmed death toll:** **1,719 deaths**, 5,034 injured (reported June 29, 2026 by Jorge Rodríguez, President of the National Assembly). Wikipedia summarizes this as "over 1,700 killed."

**Death toll trajectory** (clearly upward over June 25–29):
- June 25: ~188
- June 25 (later): ~235
- June 26: ~920
- June 28: ~1,430
- June 29: **1,719**

**Missing persons** — figures conflict:
- Wikipedia: "over 43,200"
- Euronews (June 28): "more than 68,000"
- Most outlets: "tens of thousands"
- USGS PAGER projected the eventual toll could exceed 100,000 (range ~10,000–100,000).

**Rescue status (as of June 29):** The critical 72-hour window passed June 27, but live rescues continued (a woman pulled out after 86 hours; 7 extracted in one day). ~30,000 Venezuelan workers, ~2,700 foreign experts, and 300+ U.S. personnel are deployed, with aid from 24 countries. A Mw 4.6 aftershock hit near Caracas on June 29.

The event was two quakes (Mw 7.2 foreshock + Mw 7.5 mainshock 39 seconds apart) centered in Veroes, Yaracuy, with worst damage in La Guaira and Caracas — the strongest Venezuelan quake since 1900.

sources.title: 2026 Venezuela earthquakes - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Over 1,700 people were killed, over 5,000 were injured, and over 43,200 were reported missing. USGS PAGER predicted the death toll could potentially exceed 100,000.

sources.title: Venezuela earthquakes live updates: Death toll rises - ABC News
sources.snippet: Death toll rises to 1,719; another 5,034 injured, per Jorge Rodriguez (June 29). 3 Americans dead, 12 missing per US government.

sources.snippet: 1,719 confirmed dead, 5,034 injured, 15,866 displaced; ~30,000 Venezuelan workers and 2,700 foreign experts; aid from 24 countries; Mw 4.6 aftershock June 29.

sources.snippet: At least 1,430 killed (June 28); 60-year-old woman rescued after 86 hours; tens of thousands reported missing.

sources.snippet: More than 68,000 reportedly still missing; 1,430 killed, 3,238 injured; UNDP estimate $6.7 billion direct physical damage.

sources.title: June 26, 2026 — Over 900 killed in Venezuela earthquakes - CNN
sources.snippet: At least 920 dead and over 3,000 injured as of June 26.

sources.snippet: Death toll up to around 235, 4,300 injured per health minister; second quake the strongest.
